name: Lieutenant Kess
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, scout lieutenant in mud-stained cloak, campfires behind, tense whisper, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: That camp runs on fear and a banner. Take the banner, and fear turns sideways.

nodes.text:
Their standard is kept below the command trench.

They call it a ‘vault’—it’s more like a buried shrine.

If you have the codebook, you can fake a horn pattern to pull guards away—once.
